$schema_note: RDR-007 §4 golden conformance fixture — the AgentTask / AgentResult / AgentOutcome shapes. CROSS-HOST: both the TS host (interfaces in types.ts) and the Python host (TypedDicts in run_arm.py) assert these exact key sets and the AgentOutcome value set. Field names are the JSON contract keys (camelCase) — identical across hosts so a fixture is byte-identical. `timeout` is in MILLISECONDS; `cost` is USD (0 for free-local).
